description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a distinctive combination of dark metal and wood components. The stock, handguard, and pistol grip are made of wood, featuring a smooth, polished finish with a rich brown color. The receiver, barrel, and magazine are constructed from black metal, with the magazine being curved and detachable. The rifle is equipped with simple iron sights, including a front post and a rear notch, and the barrel extends forward with a basic muzzle device. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, typical of military rifles used in urban environments. The proportions and features suggest a reliable, mass-produced firearm suitable for a variety of operational contexts.
description: A classic assault rifle with a wooden stock and grip, black metal receiver, and a curved detachable magazine. It features iron sights and a robust, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wooden stock, handguard, pistol grip, curved magazine, and full length of the barrel with iron sights.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the alignment of the barrel, receiver, and wooden components, with the magazine barely visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same wooden and metal features, with the magazine and iron sights clearly visible.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the stock, magazine, and barrel, with the trigger guard and magazine release visible.
